creator: lacey.leanne@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 193191
databases/pg_partman patch update to 3.1.3

This is a patch to update pg_partman from 3.1.2 to 3.1.3.

The update builds correctly against PostgreSQL 9.4, 9.5, 9.6, and 10 on FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE, 10.4-RELEASE, and 11.1-RELEASE amd64 and i386. 

It fails on 9.3, but this particular port is known to not work with PostgreSQL 9.3.

Everything updates correctly as an extension in PostgreSQL in addition to the Poudriere builds.

Please let me know if further work is required here. Thank you. =)
